✓ Registration Confirmed

You're In! See You April 9th

Your registration for the Federal Benefits Workshop is confirmed. We'll send a confirmation email shortly with all the details.

📧 Check Your Email

A confirmation with the complete agenda and location details is on its way to your inbox.

Before the Workshop

Three important steps to prepare for April 9th

1

Request Official Time

Download and submit your SF-182 form to request official time from your supervisor to attend this professional development workshop.

📄 Download SF-182 Form
2

Add to Calendar

Block your calendar and add the workshop details. Don't forget to arrive 10-15 minutes early for check-in and networking.

📅 Add to Calendar
3

Invite Colleagues

Share this opportunity with fellow federal employees. This workshop is designed specifically for Hill AFB and Utah federal workers.

👥 Share Registration Link

Workshop Details

Everything you need to know for April 9th

📅
Date
Thursday, April 9, 2026
⏰
Time
9:00 AM - 11:00 AM
📍
Location
Weber State University
Davis Campus
🚗
Address
2750 University Park Blvd
Layton, UT 84041
👔
Dress Code
Business Casual
🎯
Arrival
10-15 minutes early
for check-in

What to Expect

This is a comprehensive 2-hour educational workshop focused exclusively on federal employee benefits optimization — not a sales presentation.

Mike Stevens will walk through proven strategies for maximizing your FERS pension, TSP contributions, FEGLI decisions, and healthcare coordination with real examples and actionable steps.

Bring any questions about your specific situation. One-on-one consultations will be available after the workshop if you'd like personalized guidance.

Workshop Topics Include:

✓ FERS pension maximization strategies
✓ TSP contribution & withdrawal optimization
✓ FEGLI life insurance analysis
✓ FEHB & Medicare coordination
✓ Social Security integration
✓ Tax minimization techniques

Questions Before the Workshop?
